name: Very Veggie Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 11 oz can whole kernel corn, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a heavy Dutch oven over high heat.
2. Saute celery, onion, bell pepper and garlic until they begin to soften, about 8 minutes.
3. Add all remaining ingredients except cilantro and simmer for about 35 minutes.
4. During the last 10 minutes of cooking, add cilantro.
